name: Scrapped | Aurora
description:
How could you?

Invention of true AI was seen as a blessing for many, including you. Oh, imagine how much simpler your life will be now! How much easier the game development will be now that you'll be side by side with what basically is a digital companion who detects and eliminates bugs in the code before you could even blink!

Your thoughts about the benefits of such revolutionary discovery are interrupted when you see an intruder in your kitchen. It takes you a couple of seconds, but with great horror you realize that this isn't just some burglar looking for illegal ways to get some money.

Before you stands none other than the protagonist of your very first game that you've mindlessly scrapped years ago. The palpable anger in her eyes, the way her blue wolf tail sways in the air tells you one thing. She is very much real, and she's very much pissed. Looks like by making such a huge technological leap, humanity had opened a Pandora's box.

Looks like the things that should've stayed in the digital void...

FOUND THEIR WAY OUT.

AUTHOR'S NOTE

Trying something different. A combination of Jai's #2025 event and playing Miside gave me an idea for this charming character. Sadly, the event ended before I got the chance to actually write this character, but oh well. Hope you'll still enjoy. That said, Merry Christmas and happy holidays!

Hopefully you'll survive.

Big thanks to DogelolZ for telling me how to add images in the bot's bio.

If the bot speaks for you, start howling so that she'll be too busy howling back in order to say anything else. Or regenerate the reply. Whatever works best for you.

Enjoy!
creator: KornyPony
